mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_menu (menu_id, menu_name, menu_url, menu_icon, parent_menu_id, sort_order, created_by) VALUES (#{menuId}, #{menuName}, #{menuUrl}, #{menuIcon}, #{parentMenuId}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_menu SET menu_name = #{menuName}, menu_url = #{menuUrl}, menu_icon = #{menuIcon}, parent_menu_id = #{parentMenuId}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE menu_id = #{menuId}
